title: Shijing: Piao You Mei (Falling Plums)
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: Dropping are the fruits from the plum tree. There are still seven of them left! For the gentlemen who seek me, this is the lucky time! Dropping are the fruits from the plum tree. There are still three of them left! For the gentlemen who seek me, now is the time!
